name: cloversec-ctf-forexample
description: The process of CloverSec regarding the collection and conversion of CTF questions, the construction and deployment of the platform using Docker, report writing, archiving, review, and submission to Codex.

interface.shortDescription: The periodic work plugin for the Clover Security Competition covers various aspects, including the collection of competition questions, the construction of images, the writing of question manuals and reports, and the archiving and review processes.
interface.longDescription: The CloverSec CTF For Example plugin is primarily utilized for a series of periodic workflow tasks, including task reception, competition research, question resource classification, container inference, image asset verification, question information collection, standardized Docker construction on the platform, report writing, archiving and packaging, quality review, preparation for submission to the internal Hub platform, re - tagging after review, and the generation of the final report. Existing external question Dockerfiles or compose files are regarded as known assets and migration inputs. Container questions must first pass through cloversec - ctf - build - dockerizer before they can be considered as CloverSec - standardized image deliverables.
defaultPrompt: 帮我收集 10 道 2026 年的 CTF 竞赛题目
把这个包含了很多外部题目源码的目录整理成内部规范的手册、交付包
帮我收集 2024 LA CTF 的 Web 题、WP 和附件线索
